# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: ds2-edit-program.spec.ts >> DS-2 Edit Program (Didaxis Studio) >> TC-021 - Rapid double-click on Save does not create duplicate updates
- Location: tests/ds2-edit-program.spec.ts:389:7

# Error details

```
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 1
Received: 2
```


# Test source

```ts
  318 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  319 |     const programName = `I.G. XSS Source ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  320 |     await createProgram(page, programName, 'I.G. xss precondition');
  321 | 
  322 |     const xssName = `<img src=x onerror=alert(1)> ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  323 | 
  324 |     // Fail loudly if the page tries to fire a native alert/confirm/prompt.
  325 |     const nativeDialogs: Dialog[] = [];
  326 |     page.on('dialog', (d) => {
  327 |       nativeDialogs.push(d);
  328 |       void d.dismiss();
  329 |     });
  330 | 
  331 |     let edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  332 |     await edit.fillProgramName(xssName);
  333 |     await edit.clickSave();
  334 | 
  335 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  336 |     await expect(programs.exactText(xssName)).toHaveCount(1);
  337 |     expect(nativeDialogs).toHaveLength(0);
  338 | 
  339 |     // Re-opening edit shows the same literal string.
  340 |     edit = await openEditModal(page, xssName);
  341 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(xssName);
  342 |   });
  343 | 
  344 |   // Reaching the "two rows sharing the same name" state requires a direct
  345 |   // DB seed (the Create flow now rejects duplicates per DS-3 AC3). Skip
  346 |   // until a fixture is available.
  347 |   test.skip('TC-018 - Editing one row of a duplicate-name pair targets only that row', async () => {
  348 |     // Pre-seed two programs with identical names via SQL/fixture, then edit
  349 |     // the second row and assert only that row is renamed.
  350 |   });
  351 | 
  352 |   test('TC-019 - Editing to a name that matches another program is rejected (DS-3 AC3)', async ({ page }) => {
  353 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  354 |     const suffix = uniqueSuffix();
  355 |     const nameA = `I.G. Existing A ${suffix}`;
  356 |     const nameB = `I.G. Existing B ${suffix}`;
  357 |     await createProgram(page, nameA, 'I.G. existing A description');
  358 |     await createProgram(page, nameB, 'I.G. existing B description');
  359 | 
  360 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, nameB);
  361 |     await edit.fillProgramName(nameA);
  362 |     await edit.clickSave();
  363 | 
  364 |     // Save is rejected: modal stays open with the entered (conflicting) value.
  365 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeVisible();
  366 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(nameA);
  367 | 
  368 |     // List still contains exactly one row of each original name; no rename took effect.
  369 |     await expect(programs.exactText(nameA)).toHaveCount(1);
  370 |     await expect(programs.exactText(nameB)).toHaveCount(1);
  371 |   });
  372 | 
  373 |   test('TC-020 - Saving with no changes is a no-op', async ({ page }) => {
  374 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  375 |     const programName = `I.G. Noop Save ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  376 |     const description = 'I.G. noop description';
  377 |     await createProgram(page, programName, description);
  378 | 
  379 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  380 |     // Change nothing.
  381 |     await edit.clickSave();
  382 | 
  383 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  384 |     const row = programs.row(programName);
  385 |     await expect(row).toBeVisible();
  386 |     await expect(row).toContainText(description);
  387 |   });
  388 | 
  389 |   test('TC-021 - Rapid double-click on Save does not create duplicate updates', async ({ page }) => {
  390 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  391 |     const suffix = uniqueSuffix();
  392 |     const originalName = `I.G. DoubleSave Source ${suffix}`;
  393 |     const newName = `I.G. DoubleSave Target ${suffix}`;
  394 |     await createProgram(page, originalName, 'I.G. double-save precondition');
  395 | 
  396 |     // Throttle PATCH so the user can race a second click against the first.
  397 |     let patchCount = 0;
  398 |     await page.route('**/api/programs/*', async (route) => {
  399 |       if (route.request().method() === 'PATCH') {
  400 |         patchCount++;
  401 |         await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
  402 |       }
  403 |       await route.continue();
  404 |     });
  405 | 
  406 |     const edit = await openEditModal(page, originalName);
  407 |     await edit.fillProgramName(newName);
  408 | 
  409 |     await Promise.all([
  410 |       edit.saveButton.click(),
  411 |       edit.saveButton.click({ force: true }).catch(() => {}),
  412 |     ]);
  413 | 
  414 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  415 |     await expect(programs.exactText(newName)).toHaveCount(1);
  416 |     await expect(programs.exactText(originalName)).toHaveCount(0);
  417 |     // Either the button was disabled in-flight, or the second click was de-duped.
> 418 |     expect(patchCount).toBe(1);
      |                        ^ Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
  419 |   });
  420 | 
  421 |   test('TC-022 - Pressing Esc while editing focused on a field discards changes', async ({ page }) => {
  422 |     const programs = new ProgramsPage(page);
  423 |     const programName = `I.G. Esc Discard ${uniqueSuffix()}`;
  424 |     const originalDescription = 'I.G. esc precondition';
  425 |     await createProgram(page, programName, originalDescription);
  426 | 
  427 |     let edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  428 |     await edit.fillProgramName(`I.G. EscDraft ${uniqueSuffix()}`);
  429 |     await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
  430 | 
  431 |     await expect(edit.dialog).toBeHidden();
  432 |     await expect(programs.row(programName)).toBeVisible();
  433 | 
  434 |     // Re-opening edit shows the original (pre-discard) values.
  435 |     edit = await openEditModal(page, programName);
  436 |     await expect(edit.programNameInput).toHaveValue(programName);
  437 |     await expect(edit.descriptionInput).toHaveValue(originalDescription);
  438 |   });
  439 | });
  440 | 
```
